problem_solved: Diagnostic errors and delayed triage lead to poor patient outcomes and inefficient resource utilization
solution_description: Differential diagnosis tool that converts patient signs and symptoms into a list of relevant diseases or triage advice without endless questions. Three products: Isabel DDx Companion (for clinicians), Isabel Self-Triage (for patients/institutions), and Isabel Clinical Educator (for teaching). Used in 90+ countries, 14 languages. API available since 2010
notes: Strong UK presence with global reach. Multi-language support (14 languages) ideal for diverse populations. Self-triage product fits NHS digital front door strategy. Clinical educator tool valuable for training
